summary: Audit CRM admin areas for CRUD/functionality bugs across 10 agents, then synthesize a fix list

fixes.bug: Radix <SelectItem value=""> ('Cualquier vigilante') is rendered; @radix-ui/react-select throws 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' at render, crashing the dropdown/page. Verified at line 306.
fixes.fix: Use a sentinel value (NONE='__none__' as in ShiftTemplates.tsx) and map it back to ''/undefined in onValueChange and handleCreate. Never use value='' on a SelectItem.

fixes.bug: events() and clips() return the raw {rows,count} body unlike devices()/relaySites() which unwrap (lines 168/199). VideoEvents.tsx does Array.isArray(evs)?evs:[] on a {rows,count} object → always []. Feature permanently shows empty state; ack/resolve/dispatch unreachable. Verified.
fixes.fix: Unwrap in both service methods: `.then((r:any)=>Array.isArray(r)?r:r?.rows??[])`, matching devices()/relaySites().

fixes.bug: handleSubmit spreads the whole fetched securityGuard (base={...fetchedData}) incl. nested guard/profileImage arrays and PATCHes it verbatim. Backend accepts only a small whitelist (documented in GuardProfilepage.save); bloated payload is rejected/ignored so edits silently don't persist, yet the page navigates away as if saved.
fixes.fix: Build a clean whitelist payload (governmentId, address, birthPlace, birthDate, hiringContractDate, gender, bloodType, maritalStatus, academicInstruction, guardCredentials) as GuardProfilepage.save() does; route nested user/identity updates via their own supported path.

fixes.bug: Edit mode maps `initialMileage: resp.initialMileage ? String(...) : ''` — 0 is falsy so a vehicle with mileage 0 (the create default) becomes '', which fails the strict create schema (min(1)/\d+). The mileage input is disabled in edit (line 311), so the user can't fix it; handleSubmit's zod validation silently blocks all edits (no toast). Verified.
fixes.fix: Use `resp.initialMileage != null ? String(...) : ''`, and in edit mode validate with a relaxed schema that makes the immutable/disabled fields optional (only ownership/description/image are editable).

fixes.bug: Edit prefills date/time via new Date(windowStart).toISOString().slice(0,10)/(11,16) — UTC wall-clock, not the local time the user entered. The create path (RouteForm) builds windowStart as new Date(`${date}T${time}:00`).toISOString() (local→UTC). So each edit re-persists the UTC time as if local, shifting the patrol window by the tz offset every save. Verified at lines 58-59.
fixes.fix: Prefill from the local Date using getHours()/getMinutes()/getFullYear() (or format(d,'HH:mm')) so it round-trips with the local-time create path.

fixes.bug: Dispatcher cell: `(guardName && (guardName.fullName||guardName.name)) || guardName || '-'`. guardName is the full securityGuard association object (no `name` column); if fullName is falsy (draft guards allow null) it falls through to `|| guardName` → renders the raw object → React #31 crash. Verified at line 396.
fixes.fix: Compute a string-only name (fullName||name||'-') and drop the `|| guardName` object fallback.

fixes.bug: Identical to DispatchDetailsPage: same `... || requestPayload.guardName || '-'` object fallback on the securityGuard association → React #31 crash when fullName is null. This is also the shared/public-facing print path.
fixes.fix: Same fix — render a string-only dispatcher name; remove the raw-object fallback.

fixes.bug: Guard is only `loading || !data` but the body dereferences `q!.monthlyCents` etc. where q=data?.quote; the `q!` assertion hides that quote may be absent (canceled/expired tenant). If quote is missing the page throws after passing the data guard.
fixes.fix: Add `!data.quote` to the guard condition (or render the price sections only `if (q)`) instead of asserting q!.

fixes.bug: watchedClientIds effect treats all assigned clients as newly 'added' on load (prevClientIdsRef starts []), so it unions ALL sites of every assigned client onto saved postSiteIds. Opening a user assigned to client A but only 1 of A's sites silently broadens to all of A's sites; Guardar over-grants access the admin never selected (security).
fixes.fix: Seed prevClientIdsRef.current with the user's initial clientIds before the auto-add logic, or gate auto-add behind explicit user interaction so hydration preserves saved postSiteIds.

fixes.bug: One <DropdownMenu> wraps two sibling <DropdownMenuContent> blocks (lines 900 & 920). Radix renders one trigger against the first content only; the second (Edit, Despachar a supervisor, Close, Delete) is unreachable, so operators can't delete/close/dispatch from the row menu.
fixes.fix: Merge all items into a single DropdownMenuContent.

fixes.bug: runAiRecommend does `const [result] = await ApiService.post(...)`, array-destructuring the response, but ApiService returns the parsed JSON body (object). If /scheduler/ai-recommend returns an object, the destructure throws 'not iterable' → always toasts 'Error al consultar IA'. Also passes body unwrapped ({type:'optimize'}) vs sibling POSTs that wrap in {data:{...}}.
fixes.fix: Use `const result = await ApiService.post(...)` and read result?.recommendation ?? result?.data?.recommendation; wrap body as {data:{type:'optimize'}}.

fixes.bug: Attendance queries /guard-shift?filter[guardName]=<id> with the securityGuard RECORD id (route param), but guard-shift's guardName filter keys on the USER id (per sibling GuardSummarypage which passes data.guard.id). Filter never matches → 'Sin registros de asistencia' even for guards with shifts.
fixes.fix: Use data.guard.id (linked user id) for the guard-shift filter, consistent with GuardSummary.

fixes.bug: Desktop notes table maps `notesData` (unfiltered) while search box, select-all (`===filtered.length`) and mobile list use `filtered`. Typing in search recomputes filtered but the desktop table never changes; empty-state check uses notesData.length so a zero-match search still shows all rows and select-all desyncs.
fixes.fix: Render filtered.map(...) and use filtered.length===0 for the desktop empty state, matching the mobile list.

fixes.bug: Optimistic row after create uses `guardName: normalizePerson(res.guardName)`, but the create endpoint returns guardName as the FK UUID string (not a {name} object); normalizePerson(string) passes it through so the new row shows a raw UUID, and 'Creado por' shows '-'. List isn't refetched so it persists until reload.
fixes.fix: After create, refetch the list or resolve guardName from local guards (guards.find(g=>g.id===guardId)?.name) and set createdBy from the current user.

fixes.bug: SupervisorNotesPage create adapter returns the raw {messageCode,message,data} wrapper; GuardNotes reads created.id (undefined) and prepends the wrapper. Attachment POST goes out with notableId:undefined (orphaned file); note feed shows a blank card until reload. Default guard-note path has the same wrapper shape.
fixes.fix: Unwrap in the adapter: `.then(r=>r.data?.data ?? r.data)`; ideally have GuardNotes read `created.data ?? created`.

fixes.bug: loadPostSites builds clientsMap only from clientService.getClients().rows (first backend page). Tenants with more clients than the default page size get client:undefined on out-of-page rows → Cliente column shows '-' and client-name search silently misses those sites.
fixes.fix: Fetch clients with a high limit (or fetch by id / include client name in the list endpoint) instead of the default-paged getClients().

fixes.bug: totalCount is always set from incidents.length (unfiltered) while visibleRows paginates filteredIncidents; the page-count footer overstates pages when filtered, and the empty state keys off incidents.length so a zero-match filter shows a blank table body with no message.
fixes.fix: Derive totalCount and the empty-state condition from the effective list (filteredIncidents ?? incidents).

fixes.bug: handleDelete() calls shiftTemplateService.remove(id) immediately with no confirmation (unlike TimeOff/ShiftExchange which confirm). The 'Eliminar' menu item destroys a template on a single accidental click, no undo.
fixes.fix: Wrap in `await confirmDialog({title:'Eliminar plantilla',tone:'danger',...})` from @/components/ui/confirmDialog and only remove() on confirm.

fixes.bug: Entire page is an unwired stub: handleSubmit validates `visitor` then only setIsAddOpen(false) with no API call; rows hardcoded [] so the list never loads; search/import/export/bulk-delete inert; no service imported. Submitting silently discards input with no toast.
fixes.fix: Wire form to vehicleService.create({data:...}) with loading/disabled + error toast, load rows via list, refetch after create/delete.

fixes.bug: Unwired stub: rows hardcoded [] so the table always shows empty state; aplicarFiltros/search/export/bulk only console.log; the clientAssignments/postSiteAssignments fetches populate state that's never read; no visitorLog service called → no visits ever render.
fixes.fix: Fetch visit records (visitorLogService.list) into rows, render them, and wire filter/search/export/bulk to real handlers.

fixes.bug: Search Input onChange only console.logs; aplicarFiltros validates then console.logs and closes without passing categoryId/status to routeService.list (list effect deps only [limit,page]); bulk 'Acción' Select onValueChange console.logs. Filters/search/bulk do nothing; only per-row 'Ver' works.
fixes.fix: Add filters/search to the list effect deps and forward to routeService.list; implement the bulk handler (destroy/status update) with refetch.

fixes.bug: loadUsers/loadClients/loadCurrentUser only console.error on failure — no error state, no skeleton, rows stays []. A 500/bad-token/tenant failure renders the normal 'No se encontraron resultados' empty state, masking the real error with no retry.
fixes.fix: Add loading and error states (as SecurityGuardsPage does) and surface a distinct error banner/toast separate from the genuine empty state.

fixes.bug: `station.isActive && station.activeGuards.length > 0` dereferences activeGuards.length guarded only by isActive. If the activeStatus endpoint returns isActive:true with activeGuards null/omitted, .length throws and the Estaciones section crashes.
fixes.fix: Use `(station.activeGuards?.length ?? 0) > 0` and station.activeGuards?.map on line 402.

fixes.bug: load() uses `.catch(()=>{})` with no error state; any failure (network/403/500) is swallowed, loading→false, rows stays [] → renders 'Sin registros.' indistinguishable from genuinely empty, masking the error (unlike sibling LoginHistory/SystemLogs).
fixes.fix: Set an error state in the catch and render an error/retry surface as the sibling pages do.

fixes.bug: loadProjects catches with only console.error(e), leaving projects/totalCount unchanged and no error UI. A failed GET /client-project renders as the 'crea tu primer proyecto' empty state, masking the failure.
fixes.fix: Track an error state in the catch and surface a toast/inline error banner instead of the empty state.

fixes.bug: List renders rec.station?.stationName and filters search on it, but the request LIST include (requestRepository lines 434-454) omits the station association (only in the detail/find include). So rec.station is always undefined on list rows — 'Estación' always '—' and station search never matches. Optional chaining prevents a crash.
fixes.fix: Add the station association to the request list include on the backend (or read a station-name string the list actually returns; else drop the station search predicate).

fixes.bug: Page tracks page/limit=25/totalCount and sends limit/offset, but renders no pagination controls; setPage/setLimit are never called and totalCount is discarded, so only the first 25 tenants are ever visible.
fixes.fix: Add a pager wired to setPage using totalCount/limit; reset page to 1 when debouncedSearch changes.

fixes.bug: allOnPageSelected checks filteredRows.every(...) over ALL pages, but handleSelectAllUsers excludes admin rows from the selection. So with any admin row present (or multiple pages) the header 'Seleccionar todos' checkbox can never reach checked even after selecting every selectable user.
fixes.fix: Compute allOnPageSelected over the current page's selectable (non-admin) rows only, mirroring handleSelectAllUsers' exclusion.

fixes.bug: The form collects form.comment (Textarea line 357) but handleCreate's payload never includes comment, so it's silently dropped — data loss with no error.
fixes.fix: Include `comment: form.comment || undefined` in the create payload (or remove the field if unsupported).

fixes.bug: Renders avatar from sup.photoUrl (declared on the Supervisor type) but the backend supervisorProfileService.shape() never emits photoUrl, so it's always undefined — the avatar always falls back to the generic icon; the photo feature is silently dead.
fixes.fix: Add photoUrl to the backend shape() (resolve the user's avatar) or remove the dead photoUrl rendering path.

fixes.bug: Each mapped row is wrapped in a keyless Fragment `<>`; the key is on the inner <tr>, not the list-root Fragment → React 'unique key prop' warning every render.
fixes.fix: Use <Fragment key={item.id}> (React.Fragment) as the list root and drop the redundant inner <tr> key.

fixes.bug: Fully un-wired: rows come from MOCK_POLICIES; handleCreate/handleDraft just setOpenNew(false) with no persistence; bulk Eliminar/Publicar/Mover a borrador have no onClick. User saves a policy → dialog closes, nothing persisted, no toast → believes it saved.
fixes.fix: Wire to a real policies service (list/create/update/destroy) and implement the dialog submit + bulk handlers, or disable the create/bulk UI until the endpoint exists.

fixes.bug: Stubbed: rows always [], guards always [], dialog onSubmit + onToggleStatus/onBulkDelete are empty no-ops, no service imported. Creating a department closes the modal, persists nothing, no toast. SkillSetsPage has the same pattern.
fixes.fix: Wire both pages to their backend CRUD services (fetch rows+guards, create/update/toggle/delete with refetch) as incident-types/license-types do, or hide the create UI until wired.

fixes.bug: Purely mock: currentPlan hardcoded 'professional', all customer/dates/status/usage hardcoded JSX, handleConfirm/'Comprar'/'Gestionar Suscripción' only console.log. Buying or changing a plan does nothing and displayed data never reflects the real tenant.
fixes.fix: Drive plan/status/usage from the subscription backend and wire handleConfirm to the plan-change/checkout endpoint, or gate the page as not-yet-implemented.

result.summary: Reviewed and verified 34 code-grounded CRM findings; all are real and distinct (no true duplicates beyond videoService already covering events()+clips()), none speculative. Spot-verified the top 5 high-severity items against source (ShiftExchange empty SelectItem crash at line 306, videoService missing rows-unwrap, EditSecurityGuardPage bloated payload, NewVehiclePage mileage=0 edit lock, EditRoutePage UTC/local tz drift, DispatchDetailsPage #31 object fallback). Ranked by severity then blast radius. Top priorities: 5 HIGH — a guaranteed render crash (ShiftExchange value=\"\" SelectItem), a fully-dead feature (video Eventos/clips shape mismatch), silent non-persisting edits (EditSecurityGuardPage), an edit lock on all zero-mileage vehicles (NewVehiclePage), and progressive timezone corruption of patrol windows on every route edit (EditRoutePage). Followed by React #31 object-render crashes in both dispatcher views, a Billing null-deref, a security over-grant on office-user edit, and a cluster of CRUD-wiring stubs, missing error states, and shape mismatches. Recurring themes: unwrapped {rows}/wrapper response shapes, rendering raw Sequelize association objects, error swallowing that masks failures as empty states, and several fully-unwired stub pages that silently discard user input.
